summary: Completed testing of NASSAQ multi-tenant school management system - User Creation API, User Action Buttons, and TenantsManagement page with interactive stats and toggles

integration_issues.issue: User creation via wizard shows error toast 'حدث خطأ أثناء إنشاء الحساب' despite API working correctly. Likely phone number format validation issue in frontend

action_items: Investigate CreateUserWizard phone number format - wizard may be sending invalid phone format causing API rejection
Verify phone validation regex in CreateUserWizard.jsx handleSubmit function

success_rate.frontend: 95% - All features working except CreateUserWizard final submission

seed_data_creation: Created test users via API: test_admin_*, test_ops_*, test_teacher_*, test_account_*
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs working correctly. User creation with platform_admin role works via API. TenantsManagement page uses SAMPLE_SCHOOLS mock data for display. User action buttons (View, Suspend, Edit, Delete, Notify) all functional with proper modals.

user_creation_api.teacher_role: PASSED - User created successfully with region/city/school

users_management_page.notify_button: PASSED - Opens notification modal with form

tenants_management_page.interactive_stats_card: PASSED - Shows total schools (6) with clickable status filters
tenants_management_page.open_dashboard_button: PASSED - Button present on each card

create_user_wizard.step5_submission: ISSUE - Shows error toast despite API working

mocked_data_note: TenantsManagement page uses SAMPLE_SCHOOLS mock data for demo display
